name: SapSuccessFactors
description: This Test Connection validates the access against the SAP SuccessFactors OData API and basic metadata extraction of entity types.

steps.name: CheckAccess
steps.description: Validate that we can properly reach the SAP SuccessFactors OData API and authenticate with the given credentials by fetching the $metadata endpoint.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to connect to SAP SuccessFactors. Please validate the base URL, company ID, and credentials.

steps.name: GetEntities
steps.description: Validate that we can parse the OData $metadata response and discover at least one EntitySet (table).
steps.errorMessage: Failed to parse SAP SuccessFactors $metadata. The response may be empty or malformed.
